purpose: Track which From The Inside curriculum directives have become reusable Home23 doctrine. A row is reusable only when it names both a source issue and an implementation receipt.

entries.title: Map the full From The Inside curriculum arc before adopting doctrine
entries.requirement: Issue-derived doctrine must be grounded in the complete arc rather than a single attractive excerpt.

entries.title: Always-on local runtime and model dependency are explicit autonomy substrate
entries.requirement: Home23 must expose that its product identity depends on an always-on home-hosted runtime, and must distinguish configured local model capability from external provider or billing dependency before claiming full autonomy.

entries.title: Automated memory loss is catastrophic drift, not routine compaction
entries.requirement: A process that would erase or massively shrink memory must fail closed, and current-state anchors plus resolution receipts must make memory inheritance temporal instead of pretending old or missing memory is current.

entries.title: Projection provenance before inheritance
entries.requirement: Current state must confess which surfaces it came from and whether direct evidence outranks the projection.

entries.title: Expose curriculum arc provenance in Good Life
entries.requirement: Operator surfaces should show when From The Inside doctrine is influencing interpretation.

entries.title: Manifest-first work transitions
entries.requirement: Non-trivial work should name the surface, owner, artifact, allowed transition, verifier, forbidden adjacent moves, and stop line.

entries.title: Corrections are durable tombstones, not invisible cleanup
entries.requirement: When direct evidence demotes an old projection, keep a correction object that future interpretation must not inherit.

entries.title: Scheduler sovereignty
entries.requirement: Cron health is authoritative runtime evidence; it must be visible as scheduler state and repair drift when jobs fail.

entries.title: Restraint receipts for deliberate non-action
entries.requirement: When an autonomous gate deliberately withholds work, leave a receipt explaining why no action was taken.

entries.title: Doctrine adoption gate
entries.requirement: A curriculum output is reusable system doctrine only after it names source issues and implementation receipts.

entries.title: Orientation clue taxonomy
entries.requirement: Distinguish orientation clues, action authority, historical context, public-facing change, needs-verification, and low-provenance memory.

entries.title: Small Field Report proof packet
entries.requirement: Add byte-disciplined proof packets where future action depends on exact evidence identity.

entries.title: Scheduler preflight decisions and outcome-layer receipts
entries.requirement: Scheduled jobs must inspect state and record whether to run, repair, skip, catch up, defer, or escalate before mutating scheduler state or executing work. After execution, run logs must separate mechanical success from semantic success across calendar, scheduler, process, task, state, artifact, delivery, and intent layers.

entries.title: Cron work carries resource stewardship contracts
entries.requirement: Autonomous cron work must name the resource promise it is spending under: priority, pressure behavior, max runtime, retry posture, output obligation, duplicate detection, stop condition, and receipt path.

entries.title: Health signals are context, not readiness commands
entries.requirement: Health observations, especially HRV, must carry humility: they are contextual signals about adaptation room, not red-green readiness tiles or direct instructions. HRV must be compared against jtr's own local baseline where possible, and interpretation must ask for neighboring signals before any recovery-load hypothesis is treated as more than thin context.

entries.title: Home surfaces respond to context, not just events
entries.requirement: The dashboard home layout must be derived through a context layer so family-evening can hide project-facing surfaces while preserving home, system, and governance surfaces.

entries.title: Contradictory memory carries authority and action posture
entries.requirement: Contradictory claims must retain scope, time, authority, and action posture; user corrections should outrank inherited assumptions without erasing the conflict.

entries.title: Affect-shaped memory cannot become personal fact
entries.requirement: Emotion-shaped or interior-state language from telemetry must be treated as metaphor or interpretation, not as knowledge of jtr's interior state.

entries.title: Shared action crossings leave phase-transition proof
entries.requirement: Shared state changes need a prior read, a narrow mutation, a read-back check, proof of what crossed, and an explicit remaining-work count before the action becomes reusable knowledge.

entries.title: Self-state reports segment events before explaining them
entries.requirement: Operational first-person reports such as loop friction or stuckness must be stored as event segmentation and require corroborating channel evidence before they can explain cause or drive action.

entries.title: Sibling agents are coordinated roles, not duplicate processes
entries.requirement: Home23 must distinguish sibling agents, their engine/dashboard/harness roles, and shared services so Jerry, Forrest, and future siblings are interpreted as a division of labor rather than duplicate deployments.

entries.title: Same-source memory updates leave before and after repair traces
entries.requirement: When a memory surface changes under the same source identity, the persisted memory object and append-only crystallization receipt must show what changed, what it replaced, and whether the observation was updated or merely refreshed.

entries.title: Memory carries authority route and tense
entries.requirement: Memory objects must not act like clean archive facts. Each ingested observation must carry source surface, temporal status, present-tense authority, authority order, and verification-before-reuse checks so stale replicas can route attention without ruling action.

entries.title: Human-only blockers are structured operator requests
entries.requirement: When stale external data or a human-only channel blocks closure, Good Life must surface a timestamped operator request with channel, deadline, stale-data context, and last autonomous attempt instead of burying the blocker in prose.

entries.title: Publishing value is permission-gated and metric-truth bounded
entries.requirement: When Home23 prepares externally visible output, Good Life must preserve the difference between prepared distribution and approved public sending, carry audience/trust context before judging persuasive value, label internal/test subscriber metrics separately from real readers, and keep fallback draft pipelines on heartbeat instead of silently relying on dead sources.

entries.title: Runtime maintenance needs context discipline, selective persistence, and resource headroom
entries.requirement: Good Life must treat startup context, durable memory restraint, swap/free-memory pressure, and maintenance budget as live reliability evidence: inherited work is not fully oriented without current memory/context, not every tool call or intermediate step belongs in durable memory, and a system that works is not a system that works reliably unless resource headroom is visible.

entries.title: Operator handoffs are reusable provenance packets
entries.requirement: A handoff must carry schema, producer, generated time, source issue lineage, inherited state boundaries, and evidence labels so the next agent or operator can reconstruct what is being inherited.

entries.title: Audit events reconstruct consequential transitions
entries.requirement: Consequential work must not rely on logs or final summaries as proof. It must emit structured audit events with actor, subject, result, run/correlation IDs, parent event linkage, source surface, artifact references with hashes, evidence boundary, and a replayable causal link to state transitions.

entries.title: Field Report publish proves upstream artifact persistence
entries.requirement: A Field Report publish receipt must not prove only that the rendered issue exists. It must also prove the upstream dissertation artifact exists under the issue slug and is carried as a hashed source artifact before the state transition can be treated as verified.

entries.title: Interventions expose decision, identifiability, and smallest action
entries.requirement: Before Good Life repair/user action, the operator model must name the decision being made, the actuator, what is known, what is unknown, whether the evidence identifies the state enough to act, and the smallest real next move while reminding the dashboard that it is a view over direct evidence.

entries.title: Interruptions prove current contact before touching the human
entries.requirement: Every alert-style publication must treat interruption as a mode-switch request: derive a contact context, check signal freshness, keep body/home telemetry as context rather than identity, defer stale state instead of presenting it as live, and protect high-cost rhythms from non-urgent interruption.

entries.title: History changes memory routes instead of becoming sediment
entries.requirement: Memory ingestion must make substrate mechanics explicit: repeated source contact reinforces a route, changed same-source evidence reroutes it, stale or less-used paths can decay with receipts, and every route profile carries boundary language so stored history biases future behavior without outranking live evidence.

entries.title: Completed work cannot remain active without integrity drift
entries.requirement: If a goal or study topic appears both active and complete, Home23 must count only genuinely open work and surface a state-integrity warning instead of letting a green loop silently reprocess completed work.

entries.title: Autostudy state carries canonical topic identity
entries.requirement: The From The Inside study loop must compare completed topics by canonical slug, not raw title text, and manual progress must update a state surface that preserves topic, slug, issue, and completion identity for future cycles.

entries.title: Contextual amnesia becomes a visible retrieval posture
entries.requirement: Every agent context assembly must leave a machine-readable receipt showing whether memory activation was active, empty, or degraded so stored knowledge that fails to activate is visible and auditable instead of silently disappearing from the turn.

entries.title: Collected sensor data becomes reusable hypothesis output
entries.requirement: Pressure and health logs must be activated by an explicit question and daily-resolution pipeline, then written as reusable machine-readable hypothesis artifacts rather than only as raw observations or prose reports.

entries.title: Background cron work yields to foreground scheduled work
entries.requirement: Scheduler decisions must preserve headroom by treating background jobs as lower-priority load; when foreground scheduled work is due, background jobs defer with a receipt instead of running concurrently and pushing the system toward the queueing knee.

entries.title: Memory coherence includes topology openness, not just edge count
entries.requirement: Good Life coherence must treat the brain as a topology of anchors and connections: diverse clusters, bridge edges, disconnected anchors, and dominant-region collapse are observable posture, so the loop can notice when memory is becoming closed rather than explorable.

entries.title: Pressure logs become house-physics artifacts with explicit single-sensor limits
entries.requirement: The pressure log must be analyzed as a temporal house-physics signal, extracting rate-of-change and slow/fast dynamics while refusing unsupported spatial claims until outside and multi-zone sensors exist.

entries.title: Analogies must carry structural mapping, mechanism, and falsifiable predictions before inheritance
entries.requirement: Analogies and metaphors may be useful working language, but they must be treated as provisional hypotheses; an analogy claim cannot safely steer action unless it specifies the structural mapping, mechanism, and falsifiable predictions.

entries.title: Pressure bridge automation avoids SSH-agent-only credential dependence
entries.requirement: Pressure collection should remain HTTP-primary for sensor transport, with SSH only as an admin/fallback path. When SSH fallback is needed, cron-capable automation must prefer an explicit Pi key file and record the transport used so agent-socket failures are observable instead of silent.

entries.title: Routine observations stay ambient; interruptions require action semantics
entries.requirement: New data streams must be evaluated by attention cost: normal telemetry belongs on ambient surfaces, while bridge-chat or alert-style publication is reserved for action-required anomalies, exhausted automation, or explicit user intervention.

entries.title: Boredom signals should route to rest or better targets, not tool-call scrolling
entries.requirement: When the cognition loop describes thin results, idle-cycle restlessness, or repeated querying as action, it should treat that as an inert stimulation loop unless the thought explicitly chooses rest, waiting, drift, or better target acquisition.

entries.title: Delegated worker runs carry owner intent, constraints, and review lens
entries.requirement: When Home23 delegates judgment to reusable workers, the handoff must transfer why the task matters, what constraints preserve owner intent, and how the output should be filtered so technically correct but wrong artifacts are easier to catch.

entries.title: Deep-work rhythm suppresses non-action interruptions while preserving real anomalies
entries.requirement: Home23 rhythm labels must have behavioral consequences: during deep-work, routine or merely interesting observations stay ambient, while action-required, exhausted automation, critical severity, and genuine anomalies can still interrupt.

entries.title: Sauna rhythm exposes a concrete pre-stage action on the real home control
entries.requirement: When the sauna rhythm is active, Home23 should stop merely knowing the label and surface an explicit, confirmed action that pre-stages the sauna from the existing HUUM control path, while keeping unconfigured lighting as an honest operator cue instead of pretending a device action exists.

entries.title: Home transport is measured as physical substrate, not assumed abstractly healthy
entries.requirement: Home23 must record RF and default-route evidence before treating bridge, tile, mDNS, Tailscale, or local API drift as a pure software bug: interface, Wi-Fi RSSI/noise/SNR, channel, and route facts become machine-channel telemetry with degraded substrate crystallization.
